rulings.Case Title: YES IN MY BACK YARD, A CALIFORNIA NONPROFIT ET AL VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER to Amended PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/ PROHIBITION/ CERTIFICATION
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for September 21, 2022 line 1. RESPONDENT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO DEMURRER to Amended PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/ PROHIBITION/ CERTIFICATION is SUSTAINED in part and overruled in part. Demurrer is overruled as to the first cause of action, which is sufficiently alleged. Demurrer is sustained with leave to amend as to the cause of action for declaratory relief to allege facts showing "patter and practice" or "policy." Conclusory allegations "on information and belief" without facts giving rise to such "belief" are insufficient. Demurrer is sustained with leave to amend to allege facts supporting exhaustion of administrative remedies as to the exact issues subject to this cause of action. =(501/REQ) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (551) 285-1373; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified, and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Case Title: ZORIALL, LLC ET AL VS. LIN DEE LIU ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: For Preliminary Injunction To Enjoin Improper Trustee Sale Of Property At Hill Street Mpa
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for September 21, 2022 line 4. PLAINTIFF ZORIALL, LLC, ANNE KIHAGI For Preliminary Injunction To Enjoin Improper Trustee Sale Of Property At Hill Street is DENIED. Moving papers fail to comply with CRC 3.1110(a) and CRC 3.1113(d) and (f). Furthermore, motion is moot. Request for sanctions under CCP 128.5 is granted and sanctions awarded in the amount of $3,825 to be paid within 10 days of notice of entry of order. No reply filed. =(501/REQ) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (551) 285-1373; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849).
